description: The scout agent's grounding pass over the real tree. Observations carry evidence (a path, ideally with a line), never paraphrase.

summary.description: What the tree actually looks like relative to the brief.

observations.description: Grounded observations, each pinned to a location.

location.description: path or path:line the observation is grounded in

risks.description: Risks the implementation must guard against.

not_covered.description: Areas NOT examined; empty list is fine, an omitted list is a defect.
